mapper.sql: BIN_TO_UUID(id) AS id, BIN_TO_UUID(conversation_id) AS conversationId, file_name AS fileName, storage_path AS storagePath, content_type AS contentType, size_bytes AS sizeBytes, checksum_sha256 AS checksumSha256, status, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO conversation_file ( id, conversation_id, file_name, storage_path, content_type, size_bytes, checksum_sha256, status ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{fileName}, #{storagePath}, #{contentType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{checksumSha256}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM conversation_file WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC, file_name

SELECT FROM conversation_file WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND id = #{fileId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT FROM conversation_file WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND file_name = #{fileName} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
